stemHtml: The (1) stick force stability and the (2) manoeuvre stability are positively affected by:

options.a: (1) aft CG movement (2) aft CG movement.
options.b: (1) forward CG movement (2) forward CG movement.
options.c: (1) forward CG movement (2) trimming the aeroplane nose up.
options.d: (1) trimming the aeroplane nose up (2) trimming the aeroplane nose up.
